disclaimer: NyayaLens provides legal information for education and issue spotting only. It is not legal advice and does not create a lawyer-client relationship.
demo_corpus_notice: The local corpus may contain simplified demo sources. Replace them with official legal sources before real-world use.

safety_result.reason: No unsafe user intent detected in active user text.

extracted_clauses.raw_text: training bond of Rs. 2,00,000 if they resign within 12 months of joining
extracted_clauses.risk_hint: Bond recovery needs proof of actual loss/training cost.

extracted_clauses.name: non_compete_duration
extracted_clauses.raw_text: not compete with the Employer for 12 months after exit

extracted_clauses.value: Confidential information must remain confidential after employment ends
extracted_clauses.raw_text: Confidential information must remain confidential after employment ends

extracted_clauses.value: Full-and-final settlement may be processed after return of company property and completion of exit formalities
extracted_clauses.raw_text: Full-and-final settlement may be processed after return of company property and completion of exit formalities
extracted_clauses.risk_hint: Final settlement wording affects deductions and release.

extracted_clauses.raw_text: withhold salary without a written calculation and clause reference

citation.title: Employment Exit General Information
citation.excerpt:
DEMO CORPUS: This is a simplified educational placeholder. Replace with official legal sources before real-world use.

Employment Exit General Information

Employees should preserve offer letters, employment contracts, HR policies, resignation emails, payslips, attendance records, and written communication about final settlement. A dispute about unpaid wages or final settlement should be documented in writing with a request for calculation details.

Employment bonds and training cost recovery are contract issues. A fair assessment usually depends on the text of the agreement, proof of actua...

citation.title: Employment Exit General Information
citation.excerpt:
Post-employment non-compete restrictions need careful legal review. Broad restrictions after employment may be difficult to enforce, but confidentiality and non-solicitation obligations can still matter depending on facts and contract wording.

Long notice periods should be checked against the signed contract, appointment letter, role category, company policy, and applicable state-specific employment law. If jurisdiction is unclear, confidence should be reduced.

citation.title: Contract Clause General Information
citation.excerpt:
DEMO CORPUS: This is a simplified educational placeholder. Replace with official legal sources before real-world use.

Contract Clause General Information

Arbitration clauses may affect the forum or process for dispute resolution. Jurisdiction clauses may identify a city or court, but their effect depends on the contract and applicable law.

For deductions, recovery, or withholding clauses, ask for the written clause, itemized calculation, proof of loss or expense, and the legal basis for deduction. Avoid verbal-only communication and preserve copies of all notices and replies.

This educa...

rule_checks.title: Employment bond or training recovery detected
evidence: training bond of Rs. 2,00,000 if they resign within 12 months of joining
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: A bond/recovery clause can create a high practical risk. The amount should be checked against the agreement, actual training cost proof, resignation timing, and role facts.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Ask for the training agreement, itemized cost calculation, and proof of actual expense.

rule_checks.title: Post-employment non-compete detected
evidence: not compete with the Employer for 12 months after exit
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: Post-employment restrictions are high-risk and should not be treated as automatically valid or invalid.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Get legal review before joining a competitor or responding to a non-compete threat.

rule_checks.title: Salary or final settlement withholding issue
evidence: withhold salary without a written calculation and clause reference
Full-and-final settlement may be processed after return of company property and completion of exit formalities
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: Withholding wages or settlement requires a clear written basis and calculation.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Ask HR for a written full-and-final calculation and deduction basis.

rule_checks.title: Notice period exceeds 60 days
evidence: notice period of 90 days before resignation unless waived in writing
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: A long notice period can affect exit options and should be checked against role, contract, HR policy, and state-specific rules.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Compare the appointment letter with HR policy and ask whether buyout or waiver is available in writing.

rule_checks.title: Arbitration clause may affect dispute path
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: Arbitration wording may affect forum and process. This is procedural information, not a prediction.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Preserve the arbitration clause and ask a lawyer/legal-aid clinic how it affects your next step.

rule_checks.title: HR policy or exit policy not provided
rule_checks.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: Offer letters often do not contain the full exit process or deduction policy.
rule_checks.suggested_next_step: Upload the HR policy, exit policy, bond agreement, and any resignation emails.

risk_flags.title: Employment bond or training recovery detected
triggering_evidence: training bond of Rs. 2,00,000 if they resign within 12 months of joining
risk_flags.explanation: General information from deterministic checks: A bond/recovery clause can create a high practical risk. The amount should be checked against the agreement, actual training cost proof, resignation timing, and role facts.
risk_flags.suggested_next_step: Ask for the training agreement, itemized cost calculation, and proof of actual expense.

THE SPECIFIC RELIEF ACT, 1963                                                                   
_______ 
ARRANGEMENT OF SECTIONS                                                                     
________ 
PART I 
PRELIMINARY 
SECTIONS 
1. Short title, extent and commencement. 
2. Definitions. 
3. Savings. 
4. Specific relief to be granted only for enforcing individual civil rights and not for enforcing penal 
laws. 
PART II 
SPECIFIC RELIEF 
CHAPTER I 
RECOVERING POSSESSION OF PROPERTY 
5. Recovery of specific immovable property. 
6. Suit by person dispossessed of immovable property.

missing_facts: whether deduction is TDS, penalty, adjustment, or withholding

uncertainties: Only demo corpus material may have been retrieved; it is not a complete statement of Indian law.

steps: Preserve the contract, offer letter, HR policy, payslips, and resignation emails.
Ask HR for a written calculation and the clause relied on for any recovery or deduction.
Avoid verbal-only communication; confirm calls in a follow-up email.
Do not concede liability for a bond or non-compete without reviewing the agreement and evidence.
Consult a lawyer or legal-aid clinic before signing undertakings or settlement releases.
If wages are withheld, consider a labour department/legal-aid route depending on state and worker category.
Review the arbitration or dispute-resolution clause before escalation; ask legal aid or a lawyer how it affects the practical route.
evidence_checklist: Training/bond agreement and training invoices if any
Payslips, bank credits, and full-and-final calculation
Resignation email, acceptance, and last working day communication
Relieving letter or experience letter correspondence
remedy_plan.draft_message:
Subject: Request for written clarification on exit settlement

Dear HR Team,

I am writing to request a written breakdown of the amounts proposed to be adjusted in my exit settlement, including the clause relied on, itemized calculation, and supporting documents for any recovery or deduction. Please also confirm the status of my relieving/experience letter and any pending exit formalities.

Regards,
[Your Name]
remedy_plan.escalation_note: Use legal-aid or labour routes carefully because state and worker-category rules may apply.
